comment: Kriol to English dictionary extracted from uploaded PDF for medical symptom extraction and general lexical lookup

verbs.atjamp: ask for something in return / startled
verbs.bekbon: sense something behind or coming upon one
verbs.bidrum: spread out something to lie on
verbs.definimap: turn up the volume of sound very loudly
verbs.ganwo: give me! category: holding and transfer
verbs.gri: sense something behind or coming upon one
verbs.gudei: greet with "good day!" category: vocalising and thought
verbs.kotimbek: ask a question in response to a question
verbs.krasam: cross route taken by another person
verbs.owumbek: give something in return for previous gift
verbs.skidam: make a car skid around the corner
verbs.yusumbek: use something belonging to someone else who has borrowed an equivalent thing

interrogatives.abat: how about?, what about? variant: habat
interrogatives.au: how? in what way? by what means? category: interrogatives
interrogatives.aumatj: how far? category: interrogatives / how much? category: interrogatives
interrogatives.blanga: whose / why? category: interrogatives / what for? category: interrogatives
interrogatives.ha: how? in what way? by what means? category: interrogatives
interrogatives.habat: how about?, what about? variant: habat
interrogatives.ngarni: okay? what now? category: exclamations and interjections
interrogatives.wanim: why? category: interrogatives / what? category: interrogatives
interrogatives.wilya: what are you doing that for? category: interrogatives
interrogatives.wotrong: what's wrong? what is the matter? category: interrogatives

medical_symptoms.gabarra: bald head / handle of tap / dizzy
medical_symptoms.kempinat: camp overnight out in the bush
medical_symptoms.madfait: fight with mud thrown from hands
medical_symptoms.ngar: for a penis to become erect
medical_symptoms.pajoba: win in a clash of wills
medical_symptoms.plat: stop work and sit in camp
medical_symptoms.ranimbek: drive someone back in a vehicle
medical_symptoms.shainimbek: shine a light back at someone in retaliation
medical_symptoms.tatu: ritual body cuts on chest and arms

kinship_people.banji: in-law or person of that category
kinship_people.dreitbala: person in a right marriage relationship where the subsections of the couple are in their respective 'spouse' category
kinship_people.dreitbalawei: right marriage relationship where the subsections of the couple are in their respective 'spouse' category
kinship_people.wei: right marriage relationship where the subsections of the couple are in their respective 'spouse' category

adjectives.jelasbala: for a person to be jealous
adjectives.malamwan: deibin faitfaitbat jeya en det malamwan imin smeshimap det modiga

adverbs.gudwail: for a prolonged period of time

interjections.anana: isn't it cute! category: exclamations and interjections
interjections.annan: isn't it cute! category: exclamations and interjections
interjections.aumastharran: how about that! this sounds like ‘how much that one’
interjections.bagus: forget it! category: exclamations and interjections
interjections.bastimap: terrific! really good! category: exclamations and interjections
interjections.bui: hey you! category: exclamations and interjections
interjections.indit: isn't it? is that so? true?
interjections.job: good idea! category: exclamations and interjections
interjections.koiyokoiyo: hey look! what a good one! category: exclamations and interjections
interjections.ngangi: what's this? is it? category: exclamations and interjections
interjections.wanana: isn't it cute! category: exclamations and interjections
interjections.werte: you've done it the wrong way!

nouns.bengk: bank of a river / bank for money
nouns.blanbo: flying fox / sugar glider, a kind of animal
nouns.blekdoa: particular car with one door painted black
nouns.daga: bush food / food / k.o / kind of plant / wallaby food
nouns.dinkis: tin case, metal case or box
nouns.dog: dog / greyhound type dog / wild dog
nouns.flai: red tailed dragon fly / fly / tent / kind of fly-like insect slightly larger than a gad-fly / native bee
nouns.gel: a devil who wears a red dress
nouns.kantri: country / hilly area / foreign country / gravel country
nouns.kau: cow kept in home paddock for domestic milk supply
nouns.kenbis: canvas for sleeping under or on top of
nouns.medijin: medicine for both external and internal use
nouns.medisin: medicine for both external and internal use
nouns.milk: cow's milk / milk / powdered milk / tinned milk
nouns.morrhe: edible fruit that is like green plum
nouns.murrunggan: blackcurrant, kind of edible native fruit
nouns.ngaladarra: kind of fish with coloured scales
nouns.pirla: lagijat na imin bon jat pirla bin insaid
nouns.plam: k.o / black currant / green plum / plum
nouns.poka: kind of card game based on poker
nouns.rod: cattle pad / unformed walking track / vehicular track / wet season detour / rod / road
nouns.runggai: kind of edible root with a long leaf and yellow flower
nouns.spiya: shovel-nosed spear / shovel spear / spear / fishing spear with three to five metal prongs
nouns.tjatj: charge made by police upon arrest
nouns.trak: kind of toy made from tin and wire / truck
nouns.tri: fire tree / tree species used for making fire sticks / tree sp / kurrajong tree / kapok bush / kerosene-wood tree / corkwood tree / k.o / coolibah tree / dead tree with sharp kind of wood / kind of tree / river oak / tree / woolly butt tree / yellow-wood tree
nouns.wanai: card game term referring to a combination of cards totalling 11
nouns.wolabi: grass wallaby / nail-tailed wallaby / kind of wallaby / rock wallaby / wallaby
nouns.yad: cattle yard from which cattle are loaded onto transport / yard
nouns.yarl: kind of tree used in making artifacts

common_words.medijin: medicine for both external and internal use
